channel.title: summarizedStoriesBreakingOffshootNL
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesBreakingOffshootNL, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Israel-Lebanon ceasefire extended 3 weeks amid Hormuz tensions
item.description: Hezbollah and Israel traded fire just hours after the ceasefire extension was announced, underscoring its fragility.

item.title: Self-aware robots learn tasks by watching humans; is that good?
item.description: Robots that learn by watching humans raise ethical and safety concerns.

item.title: Ignoring the War Has Been Working for Long-Term Investors
item.description: Market rebound may be fragile, but riding out waves has worked for long-term investors.

item.title: Tariffs raised consumer prices but refunds go only to businesses
item.description: Families paid higher tariffs, but only businesses get $166 billion in refunds.

item.title: How Pittsburgh, host of this year's NFL draft, became a sports mecca
item.description: Pittsburgh hosts NFL draft for first time in 80 years, thanks to passionate fans and winning teams.
